# Vježba 1: Uvod u mehaniku fluida, Pascalov i Newtonov zakon

## Fizikalni uvod

Mehanika fluida proučava ponašanje tekućina i plinova. Za razliku od krutih tijela, fluidi su tvari koje nemaju stalan oblik i neprestano se deformiraju pod utjecajem i najmanjeg tangencijalnog naprezanja. Ova vježba obrađuje dva temeljna stupa mehanike fluida:

1. **Pascalov zakon:** Tlak narinut u bilo kojoj točki zatvorenog, nestlačivog fluida prenosi se nepromijenjen u svim smjerovima. To je temelj rada hidrauličkih strojeva (dizalica, kočnica) gdje malu silu na maloj površini pretvaramo u veliku silu na velikoj površini.
2. **Newtonov zakon viskoznosti:** Definira unutarnje trenje u fluidu. Kada se slojevi fluida gibaju jedan preko drugoga, javlja se otpor koji nazivamo viskoznost. Tangencijalno naprezanje $\tau$ proporcionalno je gradijentu brzine, a faktor proporcionalnosti je dinamička viskoznost $\mu$.

Ispod možete interaktivno istražiti oba principa.

````{=html}
<div id="v1-intro-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; justify-content: center;">
        <button onclick="switchV1Tab('pascal')" id="btn-pascal" style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #3182ce; color: white; font-weight: 600; transition: 0.3s;">Pascalov zakon</button>
        <button onclick="switchV1Tab('newton')" id="btn-newton" style="padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #edf2f7; color: #4a5568; font-weight: 600; transition: 0.3s;">Newtonov zakon</button>
    </div>

    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; min-height: 250px;">
        <div style="flex: 1; position: relative; height: 250px; background: #fdfdfd; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="v1-intro-canvas" width="400" height="250" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; padding: 10px;">
            <div id="text-pascal">
                <h5 style="color: #2c5282; margin-top: 0;">Hidraulički multiplikator</h5>
                <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #4a5568; line-height: 1.5;">Budući da je tlak $p$ isti u cijelom sustavu, sila $F_2$ na velikom klipu bit će onoliko puta veća od sile $F_1$ koliko je površina $A_2$ veća od $A_1$.</p>
                <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #3182ce; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1rem; text-align: center;">
                    F₂ = F₁ · (A₂ / A₁)
                </div>
            </div>
            <div id="text-newton" style="display: none;">
                <h5 style="color: #7b341e; margin-top: 0;">Unutarnje trenje (τ)</h5>
                <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #4a5568; line-height: 1.5;">Viskoznost fluida uzrokuje otpor gibanju. Sloj uz stijenku miruje, dok se ostali slojevi "kližu" jedan preko drugoga stvarajući linearni ili parabolični profil brzine.</p>
                <div style="background: #fffaf0; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #dd6b20; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1rem; text-align: center;">
                    τ = μ · (dv / dy)
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v1-intro-canvas');
    if(!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    let currentTab = 'pascal';
    let frame = 0;

    window.switchV1Tab = function(tab) {
        currentTab = tab;
        document.getElementById('btn-pascal').style.background = tab === 'pascal' ? '#3182ce' : '#edf2f7';
        document.getElementById('btn-pascal').style.color = tab === 'pascal' ? 'white' : '#4a5568';
        document.getElementById('btn-newton').style.background = tab === 'newton' ? '#3182ce' : '#edf2f7';
        document.getElementById('btn-newton').style.color = tab === 'newton' ? 'white' : '#4a5568';
        document.getElementById('text-pascal').style.display = tab === 'pascal' ? 'block' : 'none';
        document.getElementById('text-newton').style.display = tab === 'newton' ? 'block' : 'none';
    };

    function animate() {
        if(!document.getElementById('v1-intro-canvas')) return;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 250);
        frame++;

        if (currentTab === 'pascal') {
            // Draw Pascal's setup
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.15)";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(80, 50); ctx.lineTo(80, 200); ctx.lineTo(320, 200); ctx.lineTo(320, 50);
            ctx.lineTo(280, 50); ctx.lineTo(280, 160); ctx.lineTo(120, 160); ctx.lineTo(120, 50);
            ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

            // Small piston
            let off1 = Math.sin(frame*0.05)*15;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#4a5568";
            ctx.fillRect(82, 100 + off1, 36, 10);
            // Large piston
            ctx.fillRect(282, 100 - off1*0.3, 36, 10);
            
            // Forces
            drawArrow(ctx, 100, 50 + off1, 100, 95 + off1, "#3182ce", "F₁");
            drawArrow(ctx, 300, 95 - off1*0.3, 300, 20 - off1*0.3, "#e53e3e", "F₂");
        } else {
            // Draw Newton's setup
            const h = 120; const y0 = 190;
            ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.1)";
            ctx.fillRect(50, y0-h, 300, h);
            
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#4a5568"; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(50, y0); ctx.lineTo(350, y0); ctx.stroke(); // Bottom
            ctx.fillStyle = "#2d3748"; 
            let plateOff = (frame*0.5)%50;
            ctx.fillRect(50, y0-h-10, 300, 10); // Top plate

            // Velocity profile
            ctx.strokeStyle = "#3182ce"; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.setLineDash([5,3]);
            ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(100, y0); ctx.lineTo(250, y0-h); ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);
            
            for(let i=0; i<=h; i+=30) {
                let v = (i/h) * 150;
                drawArrow(ctx, 100, y0-i, 100+v, y0-i, "#3182ce");
            }
            // Shear Stress Arrows
            drawArrow(ctx, 350, y0-h-5, 380, y0-h-5, "#e53e3e", "τ");
        }
        requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 8; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        if(label) { 
            ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter, sans-serif"; 
            ctx.fillText(label, x2 + (x2>x1?5:-25), y2 + (y2>y1?15:-5)); 
        }
    }

    animate();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 1. Ručna hidraulična dizalica

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Ručna hidraulična dizalica na slici napunjena je uljem. Ukoliko zanemarimo težinu klipova i preostalih elemenata, te mehaničke gubitke, potrebno je odrediti silu F koja će održavati sustav u ravnoteži kada teret ima masu m=1000 kg. Pretpostaviti konstantan tlak u čitavoj komori. Promjer većeg klipa $d_v = 100 \, mm$, a manjeg $d_m = 30 \, mm$. Sila F djeluje na manji klip na kraku b=400mm i oslonjena je u osloncu A (duljina a=30mm) kako je prikazano na slici.

**Zadano:**
* $m = 1000 \, [kg]$
* $d_v = 0,1 \, [m]$
* $d_m = 0,03 \, [m]$
* $a = 0,03 \, [m]$
* $b = 0,4 \, [m]$

**Odrediti:** $F = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
Površina kojom veći $d_v$ i manji $d_m$ klip djeluju na fluid:
$$A_v = d_v^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 0,00785 \, [m^2]$$
$$A_m = d_m^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 7,0686 \cdot e^{-4} \, [m^2]$$
Sila koja djeluje na veliki klip iznosi:
$$F_v = m \cdot g = 1000 \cdot 9,81 = 9810 \, [N]$$
Tlak na oba klipa je jednak:
$$p = \frac{F_v}{A_v} = \frac{9810}{0,00785} = \frac{F_m}{A_m} = 1.249.048 \, [Pa] = 1,25 \, [MPa]$$
Sila na manjem klipu sada je:
$$F_m = p \cdot A_m = 1.249.048 \cdot 7,0686 \cdot e^{-4} = 883 \, [N]$$
Za ručku vrijedi:
$$\sum M_A = 0 = -(b + a) \cdot F + a \cdot F_m \implies F = a \cdot \frac{F_m}{b + a} = \mathbf{61,6 \, [N]}$$

**DOMAĆI RAD:**
Sada je potrebno odrediti promjer manjeg klipa (uz jednake ostale dimenzije) kako bi dizalica bila u stanju podići teret (npr. automobil) težine 2500kg, pri čemu sila na ručki ne smije biti veća od 60 N.

````{=html}
<div id="z1-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z1: Simulator hidraulične dizalice (Pascalov zakon)</h4>
    
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; overflow: hidden; height: 350px;">
            <canvas id="z1-canvas" width="500" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="z1-pressure-overlay" style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                Tlak p: <span id="z1-res-p" style="font-weight: bold; color: #3182ce;">1.25</span> MPa
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Masa tereta: <span id="z1-v-m">1000</span> kg</label>
                <input type="range" id="z1-m" min="500" max="3000" step="100" value="1000" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3182ce; margin-bottom: 12px;">
                
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Omjer promjera klipova (1:X): <span id="z1-v-ratio">3.3</span></label>
                <input type="range" id="z1-ratio" min="2" max="10" step="0.1" value="3.3" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3182ce; margin-bottom: 15px;">
                
                <button id="z1-press-btn" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; background: #3182ce; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">PRITISNI (Fm)</button>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #166534; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Sila tereta Fv</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z1-res-fv">9810</span> N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eff6ff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1d4ed8; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Tlak p</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1d4ed8;"><span id="z1-res-p-side">1.25</span> MPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #eef2ff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #c7d2fe;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #3730a3; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Sila na malom klipu Fm</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #3730a3;"><span id="z1-res-fm">883</span> N</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #fff7ed; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #fdba74;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #c2410c; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Sila na ručki F</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #c2410c;"><span id="z1-res-handle">61.6</span> N</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.4; font-style: italic;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni uvid:</b> Pascalov zakon kaže da je tlak u tekućini isti. Veći omjer promjera omogućuje dizanje ogromnih tereta malom silom.
            </p>
            <div style="background: #f8fafc; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3182ce; line-height: 1.45; color: #334155;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.76rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; color: #1d4ed8; margin-bottom: 4px;">Kako čitati widget</div>
                <div style="font-size: 0.8rem;">Najprije jednaki tlak u ulju određuje silu <b>Fm</b> na malom klipu, a zatim poluga pretvara tu silu u manju silu ruke <b>F</b>. Tako je jasna veza između Pascalova zakona i statike poluge.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z1-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const mS = document.getElementById('z1-m');
    const rS = document.getElementById('z1-ratio');
    const pressBtn = document.getElementById('z1-press-btn');

    let pressAnim = 0;
    let isPressing = false;

    function update() {
        const m = parseFloat(mS.value);
        const ratio = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const dv = 0.1; 
        const dm = dv / ratio;
        const a = 0.03;
        const b = 0.4;
        
        const Fv = m * 9.81;
        const Av = dv*dv*Math.PI/4;
        const Am = dm*dm*Math.PI/4;
        const p = Fv / Av;
        const Fm = p * Am;
        const F = a * Fm / (a + b);
        
        document.getElementById('z1-v-m').innerText = m;
        document.getElementById('z1-v-ratio').innerText = ratio.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-fv').innerText = Fv.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-fm').innerText = Fm.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-p').innerText = (p/1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-p-side').innerText = (p/1e6).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z1-res-handle').innerText = F.toFixed(1);
        
        draw(m, ratio, p, Fm, Fv, F);
    }

    function draw(m, ratio, p, Fm, Fv, F) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 500, 350);
        const ox = 50, oy = 280;
        
        // Pressure-dependent color
        const pRatio = Math.min(p / 5e6, 1);
        const fluidColor = `rgba(49, 130, 206, ${0.1 + pRatio * 0.7})`;
        
        // Housing
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidColor;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(ox, oy-150); ctx.lineTo(ox+150, oy-150); ctx.lineTo(ox+150, oy);
        ctx.lineTo(ox+350, oy); ctx.lineTo(ox+350, oy-200); ctx.lineTo(ox+400, oy-200);
        ctx.lineTo(ox+400, oy+30); ctx.lineTo(ox, oy+30); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

        // Animation offsets
        const smallOff = pressAnim * 20;
        const largeOff = -smallOff / (ratio * ratio);

        // Big Piston (Left)
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillRect(ox+5, oy-160 + largeOff, 140, 15);
        // Load
        const lw = 60 + (m/3000)*40;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.fillRect(ox+75-lw/2, oy-160-lw + largeOff, lw, lw);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#fff"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter"; ctx.textAlign="center";
        ctx.fillText(m+"kg", ox+75, oy-160-lw/2 + largeOff);

        // Small Piston (Right)
        const smWidth = 150 / ratio;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillRect(ox+350 + (50-smWidth)/2, oy-210 + smallOff, smWidth, 15);

        // Lever and pivot
        const pivotX = ox + 335;
        const pivotY = oy - 225;
        const handleEndX = pivotX + 75;
        const handleEndY = pivotY - 35;
        const linkX = ox + 375;
        const linkTopY = oy - 235 + smallOff;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.lineCap = "round";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pivotX, pivotY);
        ctx.lineTo(handleEndX, handleEndY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pivotX + 12, pivotY - 6);
        ctx.lineTo(linkX, linkTopY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b";
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(pivotX, pivotY, 7, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("A", pivotX - 18, pivotY + 5);

        // Force Arrows
        drawArrow(ctx, ox+75, oy-150 + largeOff, ox+75, oy-80 + largeOff, "#3b82f6", "Fv", Fv/2000);
        drawArrow(ctx, ox+375, oy-280 + smallOff, ox+375, oy-215 + smallOff, "#ef4444", "Fm", Fm/500);
        drawArrow(ctx, handleEndX, handleEndY - 55, handleEndX, handleEndY - 4, "#f97316", "F", Math.max(F / 120, 0.5));

        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.fillText("poluga", pivotX + 22, pivotY - 28);

        if(isPressing) {
            pressAnim += 0.05;
            if(pressAnim > 1) { pressAnim = 1; isPressing = false; }
            requestAnimationFrame(() => update());
        } else if (pressAnim > 0) {
            pressAnim -= 0.02;
            if(pressAnim < 0) pressAnim = 0;
            requestAnimationFrame(() => update());
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label, scale) {
        const headlen = 10;
        const len = Math.sqrt((x2-x1)**2 + (y2-y1)**2) * (0.5 + scale);
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        const rx2 = x1 + len * Math.cos(angle);
        const ry2 = y1 + len * Math.sin(angle);

        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(rx2, ry2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(rx2, ry2);
        ctx.lineTo(rx2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), ry2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(rx2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), ry2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 11px Inter"; ctx.textAlign="left";
        ctx.fillText(label, rx2+10, ry2);
    }

    pressBtn.onclick = () => { isPressing = true; update(); };
    [mS, rS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update); 
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 2. Težina klipa i manometarski tlak

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Za sustav na slici potrebno je odrediti težinu klipa kada manometarsko očitanje tlaka iznosi 70,0 kPa. U sustavnu se nalazi ulje gustoće $\rho=860 \, kg/m^3$. Klip je promjera $d_k=1m$.

**Zadano:**
* $p_m = 70000 \, [Pa]$
* $\rho = 860 \, [kg/m^3]$
* $d_k = 1 \, [m]$
* $h = 1 \, [m]$

**Odrediti:**
a) Težinu klipa $G = ?$
b) Visinu klipa $h_k = ?$ ako je klip od željeza ($\rho_{Fe} = 7870 \, [\frac{kg}{m^3}]$)

**RJEŠENJE:**
1. **Površina klipa:**
   $A_k = d_k^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 1^2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4} = 0,7854 \, [m^2]$
2. **Ravnoteža tlakova na dubini donjeg ruba klipa:**
   $p_{klip} = p_m + \rho \cdot g \cdot h = 70000 + 860 \cdot 9,81 \cdot 1 = 78436,6 \, Pa$
3. **Težina klipa ($G$):**
   $G = p_{klip} \cdot A_k = 78436,6 \cdot 0,7854 = \mathbf{61603 \, N}$
4. **Visina klipa ($h_k$):**
   $h_k = \frac{G}{g \cdot \rho_{Fe} \cdot A_k} = \mathbf{1,016 \, m}$

````{=html}
<div id="z2-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z2: Klip u cilindru i Manometar</h4>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 20px;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 380px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z2-canvas" width="400" height="380" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            
            <!-- Manometer SVG -->
            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 10px; right: 10px; width: 120px; height: 120px;">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 100 100" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;">
                    <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="45" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="2"/>
                    <text x="50" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="bold" fill="#334155">kPa</text>
                    <!-- Ticks -->
                    <g stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1">
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(0 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(45 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(90 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(135 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(180 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(-45 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(-90 50 50)"/>
                        <line x1="50" y1="10" x2="50" y2="15" transform="rotate(-135 50 50)"/>
                    </g>
                    <!-- Needle -->
                    <line id="z2-needle" x1="50" y1="50" x2="50" y2="15" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" transform="rotate(-135 50 50)"/>
                    <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="3" fill="#1e293b"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Gustoća ulja: <span id="z2-v-rho">860</span> kg/m³</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-rho" min="700" max="1000" step="10" value="860" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3182ce; margin-bottom: 12px;">
                
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Visina stupca h: <span id="z2-v-h">1.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z2-h" min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="1.0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3182ce; margin-bottom: 15px;">

                <button id="z2-add-load" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; background: #334155; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;">DODAJ TERET (+20 kN)</button>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fff5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #fecaca;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #991b1b; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;">Izmjereni tlak p_m:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #991b1b;"><span id="z2-res-pm">70.0</span> kPa</div>
                
                <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #1e40af; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 10px;">Težina klipa G:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;"><span id="z2-res-g">61.6</span> kN</div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #4a5568; line-height: 1.5; background: #ebf8ff; padding: 10px; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #3182ce;">
                $$p = \frac{G}{A} + \rho g h$$
                Numerički: <span id="z2-eq-vals">...</span>
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z2-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const rhoS = document.getElementById('z2-rho');
    const hS = document.getElementById('z2-h');
    const loadBtn = document.getElementById('z2-add-load');
    const needle = document.getElementById('z2-needle');

    let extraLoad = 0;
    let needleOscillation = 0;

    function update() {
        const rho = parseFloat(rhoS.value);
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const Ak = Math.PI / 4; 
        const g = 9.81;

        // In this setup, we assume pm is what we read, and G is fixed based on initial problem + extra
        const baseG = 61603; // From task
        const currentG = baseG + extraLoad * 1000;
        
        const pm = (currentG / Ak - rho * g * h) / 1000;
        
        document.getElementById('z2-v-rho').innerText = rho;
        document.getElementById('z2-v-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-pm').innerText = pm.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z2-res-g').innerText = (currentG/1000).toFixed(1);
        
        document.getElementById('z2-eq-vals').innerText = `${pm.toFixed(1)} kPa = ${(currentG/1000/Ak).toFixed(1)} - ${(rho*g*h/1000).toFixed(1)}`;

        // Needle rotation: -135deg is 0kPa, 135deg is 150kPa
        const targetAngle = -135 + (pm / 150) * 270;
        needle.setAttribute('transform', `rotate(${targetAngle + needleOscillation} 50 50)`);

        draw(h, currentG, rho, pm);
        
        if(Math.abs(needleOscillation) > 0.1) {
            needleOscillation *= -0.85;
            requestAnimationFrame(update);
        } else {
            needleOscillation = 0;
        }
    }

    function draw(h, G, rho, pm) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,380);
        const bx = 100, by = 320, tw = 120, th = 220;
        
        // Fluid Gradient
        const grd = ctx.createLinearGradient(bx, by-th, bx, by);
        grd.addColorStop(0, "#fefcbf");
        grd.addColorStop(1, "#ed8936");
        
        ctx.fillStyle = grd;
        ctx.fillRect(bx, by-th, tw, th);
        
        // Piston position depends on equilibrium (visual only)
        const pistonY = by - th - 20;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillRect(bx-5, pistonY, tw+10, 30);
        
        // Manometer Pipe
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 12;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(bx+tw, by-30);
        ctx.lineTo(bx+tw+100, by-30);
        ctx.lineTo(bx+tw+100, by-th-h*40);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#ed8936"; ctx.lineWidth = 6;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(bx+tw, by-30);
        ctx.lineTo(bx+tw+100, by-30);
        ctx.lineTo(bx+tw+100, by-th-h*40);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Forces
        drawArrow(ctx, bx+tw/2, pistonY - 60, bx+tw/2, pistonY, "#ef4444", "G");
        drawArrow(ctx, bx+tw/2, pistonY + 60, bx+tw/2, pistonY + 30, "#3b82f6", "Fp");
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2+10, y2);
    }

    loadBtn.onclick = () => {
        extraLoad += 20;
        if(extraLoad > 80) extraLoad = 0;
        needleOscillation = 15;
        update();
    };

    [rhoS, hS].forEach(s => s.oninput = update);
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 3. Toplinsko širenje vode i staklene posude

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Vertikalni stakleni cilindar sadrži 900 ml vode temperature 10 °C, pri čemu visina stupca vode iznosi 90 cm. Voda i stakleni cilindar se zagrijavaju na temperaturu 80 °C. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da nema isparavanja, kolika će biti visina stupca vode ukoliko je linearni koeficijent toplinskog širenja stakla $3,6 \cdot 10^{-6} \, K^{-1}$. Koeficijent volumenskog toplinskog širenja vode pri temperaturi od 10 °C iznosi $0,088 \cdot 10^{-3} \, K^{-1}$, dok pri temperaturi 80 °C iznosi $0,643 \cdot 10^{-3} \, K^{-1}$, gustoća vode pri 10 °C iznosi 999,7 $kg/m^3$. Potrebno je usporediti proračunski dobivenu gustoću vode pri temperaturi sa tabličnom koja za 80 °C iznosi 971,8 $kg/m^3$. Potrebno je odrediti koliko će se vode preliti iz spremnika za proračunatu i tabličnu gustoću ukoliko je pri početnoj temperaturi spremnik bio napunjen do samoga vrha.

**Zadano:**
* $V_{H2O10} = V_{sp10} = 0,0009 \, [m^3], t_{v1} = 10[°C], h_{v10} = 0,9[m], \rho_{vt10} = 999,7 \, [\frac{kg}{m^3}]$
* $t_{v2} = 80[°C], \rho_{vt80} = 971,8 \, [\frac{kg}{m^3}], \alpha_s = 3,6 \cdot 10^{-6} [K^{-1}]$
* $\beta_{H2O10} = 0,088 \cdot 10^{-3} [K^{-1}], \beta_{H2O80} = 0,643 \cdot 10^{-3} [K^{-1}]$

**Odrediti:** $V_{vt80} = ?$ (tablična), $V_{vp80} = ?$ (proračunska), $V_{sp80} = ?$ (posuda)

**RJEŠENJE:**
Unutrašnjost posude i voda imaju isti volumen u početku: $h_{sp10} = h_{v10}, D_{sp10} = D_{v10}$.
Masa vode je jednaka pri promjeni temperature:
$$m_v = \rho_v \cdot V_v = \rho_{vt10} \cdot V_{v10} = \rho_{vt80} \cdot V_{vt80} = 0,89973 \, [kg]$$
Proračunsku gustoću računamo pomoću srednjeg koeficijenta $\beta_{sr} = 0,3655 \cdot 10^{-3} [K^{-1}]$:
$$\rho_{vp80} = \rho_{vt10}(1 - \beta_{sr} \cdot \Delta t) = \mathbf{974,113 \, [kg/m^3]}$$
Višak tekućine pri tabličnoj gustoći iznosi:
$$\Delta V_{vt} = V_{vt80} - V_{sp80} = \mathbf{25,158 \cdot 10^{-6} \, [m^3]}$$
Višak tekućine pri proračunskoj gustoći iznosi:
$$\Delta V_{vp} = V_{vp80} - V_{sp80} = \mathbf{22,959 \cdot 10^{-6} \, [m^3]}$$

````{=html}
<div id="z3-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z3: Termičko širenje (Voda u staklu)</h4>
    
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 30px; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; min-height: 350px;">
        <!-- Glass Cylinder -->
        <div style="position: relative; width: 120px; height: 300px; border: 4px solid #94a3b8; border-top: none; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px;">
            <div id="z3-water-fill" style="position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: 90%; background: #3b82f6; transition: height 0.3s, background 0.5s; border-radius: 0 0 6px 6px;"></div>
            <div id="z3-droplets" style="position: absolute; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden;"></div>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -10px; right: -10px; height: 10px; background: #94a3b8; border-radius: 5px;"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Thermometer -->
        <div style="width: 30px; height: 300px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 15px; position: relative; border: 2px solid #cbd5e0;">
            <div id="z3-mercury" style="position: absolute; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: 10%; background: #ef4444; border-radius: 15px; transition: height 0.3s;"></div>
            <div style="position: absolute; bottom: -10px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 45px; height: 45px; background: #ef4444; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #cbd5e0;"></div>
            <!-- Scale -->
            <div style="position: absolute; height: 100%; width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 0; font-size: 8px; color: #64748b; font-weight: bold;">
                <span>10°</span><span>30°</span><span>50°</span><span>70°</span><span>90°</span>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls & Info -->
        <div style="flex: 1; max-width: 320px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Temperatura T: <span id="z3-v-t">10</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="z3-t" min="10" max="100" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ef4444;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: #f0f9ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;">
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; font-size: 0.8rem;">
                    <div style="color: #0369a1;">Volumen vode:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z3-res-vw">900.0</span> mL</div>
                    <div style="color: #0369a1;">Gustoća ρ:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z3-res-rho">999.7</span> kg/m³</div>
                    <div style="color: #0369a1;">Visina h:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z3-res-h">90.0</span> cm</div>
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px dashed #bae6fd; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: #ef4444; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;">Preliveno:</div>
                    <div style="font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;"><span id="z3-res-overflow">0.00</span> mL</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.4; font-style: italic;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni tekst:</b> Tekućine se zagrijavanjem šire – gustoća pada, volumen raste. Staklena posuda se širi sporije od vode, pa voda prelazi rub.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const tS = document.getElementById('z3-t');
    const waterFill = document.getElementById('z3-water-fill');
    const mercury = document.getElementById('z3-mercury');
    const dropletsCont = document.getElementById('z3-droplets');

    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        document.getElementById('z3-v-t').innerText = T;
        const dT = T - 10;
        
        // Water expansion
        const beta = 0.0003655;
        const Vw = 900 * (1 + beta * dT);
        // Glass expansion (volumetric is 3 * linear)
        const Vs = 900 * (1 + 3 * 3.6e-6 * dT);
        const overflow = Math.max(Vw - Vs, 0);
        const rho = 999.7 / (Vw / 900);
        const h = 90 * (Vw / 900);

        document.getElementById('z3-res-vw').innerText = Vw.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-rho').innerText = rho.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z3-res-overflow').innerText = overflow.toFixed(2);

        // Visuals
        const fillPerc = (Vw / 900) * 90; // 90% is full
        waterFill.style.height = Math.min(fillPerc, 100) + "%";
        
        // Color transition
        const tRatio = (T - 10) / 90;
        const r = Math.floor(59 + tRatio * (239 - 59));
        const g = Math.floor(130 + tRatio * (68 - 130));
        const b = Math.floor(246 + tRatio * (68 - 246));
        waterFill.style.background = `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;

        // Mercury
        mercury.style.height = (T / 100) * 100 + "%";

        if(Vw > Vs) {
            createDroplet();
        }
    }

    function createDroplet() {
        if(Math.random() > 0.1) return;
        const d = document.createElement('div');
        d.style.position = 'absolute';
        d.style.top = '0';
        d.style.left = (Math.random() * 100) + '%';
        d.style.width = '6px';
        d.style.height = '8px';
        d.style.background = waterFill.style.background;
        d.style.borderRadius = '50%';
        d.style.opacity = '0.8';
        dropletsCont.appendChild(d);

        let pos = 0;
        const anim = setInterval(() => {
            pos += 2;
            d.style.top = pos + 'px';
            if(pos > 300) {
                clearInterval(anim);
                d.remove();
            }
        }, 10);
    }

    tS.oninput = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 4. Modul stlačivosti tekućine

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Tekućina stlačena u cilindru zauzima početni volumen od 1000 cm3 pri tlaku od 1MPa, dok pri tlaku od 2MPa zauzima volumen od 995 cm3. Potrebno je odrediti modul stlačivosti tekućine.

**Zadano:**
* $V_1 = 1000 \cdot 10^{-6} \, [m^3], p_1 = 1 \, [MPa]$
* $V_2 = 995 \cdot 10^{-6} \, [m^3], p_2 = 2 \, [MPa]$

**Odrediti:** $E = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
$$E = - \frac{dp}{dV/V} = - \frac{(p_2 - p_1) \cdot V_1}{V_2 - V_1} = - \frac{1 \cdot 10^6 \cdot 1000}{995 - 1000} = \mathbf{200 \, [MPa]}$$

***

### 5. Gustoća oceana na velikim dubinama

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Na dubini od 7km u oceanu tlak iznosi 71,6 MPa. Gustoća na površini iznosi ρ=1025 kg/m3, pri čemu modul stlačivosti iznosi 2,34 GPa za dotični raspon tlaka. Potrebno je odrediti gustoću fluida na dubini od 7km i postotak promjene gustoće fluida između površine i dubine od 7 km.

**Zadano:**
* $h = 7000[m], p_h = 71,6[MPa], \rho_0 = 1025 \, [\frac{kg}{m^3}], E_0 = 2,34[GPa]$

**Odrediti:** $\rho_h = ?, \Delta \rho = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
$$\rho_h = \rho_0 \cdot e^{\frac{p_h - p_{atm}}{E}} \approx \rho_0 \cdot (1 + \frac{\Delta p}{E}) = 1025 \cdot (1 + \frac{71,6 \cdot 10^6}{2,34 \cdot 10^9}) = \mathbf{1056,36 \, [kg/m^3]}$$
Postotak promjene gustoće: $\frac{\Delta \rho}{\rho_0} = \mathbf{3,06\%}$

````{=html}
<div id="z4-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z4: Modul stlačivosti (Liquid vs Gas)</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 250px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z4-canvas" width="400" height="250" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600;">Tlak p: <span id="z4-v-p">1</span> MPa</label>
                <input type="range" id="z4-p" min="1" max="100" step="1" value="1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
            </div>
            
            <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: #166534; margin-bottom: 5px;">STLAČIVOST (ΔV/V):</div>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                    <span style="width: 40px; font-size: 0.7rem;">Voda:</span>
                    <div style="flex: 1; height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
                        <div id="z4-bar-liquid" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: #3b82f6;"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span id="z4-val-liquid" style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: bold;">0.04%</span>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                    <span style="width: 40px; font-size: 0.7rem;">Zrak:</span>
                    <div style="flex: 1; height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;">
                        <div id="z4-bar-gas" style="width: 0%; height: 100%; background: #ef4444;"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span id="z4-val-gas" style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: bold;">90%</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.4;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni tekst:</b> Modul stlačivosti E mjeri otpor tekućine na promjenu volumena. Veći E znači manje stlačiva tekućina. Tekućine su gotovo nestlačive u usporedbi s plinovima.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div id="z5-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 30px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: #0f172a; color: white; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border: 1px solid #1e293b;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #38bdf8; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z5: Gustoća fluida na dubini oceana</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; border-radius: 12px; height: 350px; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid #1e293b;">
            <div id="z5-ocean-bg" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #38bdf8 0%, #0369a1 50%, #082f49 100%); position: relative;">
                <!-- Submarine -->
                <div id="z5-sub" style="position: absolute; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); top: 10%; font-size: 30px; transition: top 0.5s ease-out;">🚢</div>
                <!-- Depth line -->
                <div id="z5-depth-line" style="position: absolute; width: 100%; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.3); top: 10%; transition: top 0.5s;">
                    <span style="position: absolute; right: 10px; top: -15px; font-size: 10px; color: #38bdf8;"><span id="z5-v-depth-val">0</span> m</span>
                </div>
                <!-- Molecular grid (using canvas for performance) -->
                <canvas id="z5-molecules" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #1e293b;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #38bdf8;">Dubina: <span id="z5-v-depth">0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z5-depth" min="0" max="7000" step="100" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #38bdf8;">
            </div>

            <div style="background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.1); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #0369a1;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #38bdf8; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px;">PARAMETRI NA DUBINI:</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
                    <div style="color: #94a3b8;">Tlak:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #38bdf8;"><span id="z5-res-p">0.1</span> MPa</div>
                    <div style="color: #94a3b8;">Gustoća:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #38bdf8;"><span id="z5-res-rho">1025</span> kg/m³</div>
                    <div style="color: #94a3b8;">Porast ρ:</div><div style="font-weight: 700; color: #ef4444;"><span id="z5-res-perc">0.00</span> %</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.4;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni tekst:</b> Tlak u oceanu raste s dubinom i komprimira vodu. Na 7 km dubine gustoća je vidljivo veća nego na površini uslijed modula stlačivosti.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    // Z4 logic
    const z4c = document.getElementById('z4-canvas');
    const z4ctx = z4c.getContext('2d');
    const z4pS = document.getElementById('z4-p');
    
    let particles = Array.from({length: 60}, () => ({ 
        x: Math.random()*400, y: 100 + Math.random()*150, 
        vx: (Math.random()-0.5)*2, vy: (Math.random()-0.5)*2 
    }));

    function updateZ4() {
        const p = parseFloat(z4pS.value);
        document.getElementById('z4-v-p').innerText = p;
        
        const dL = (p / 2340) * 100; // Liquid compression %
        const dG = Math.min((p / 1.1) * 10, 95); // Gas compression % (huge)
        
        document.getElementById('z4-bar-liquid').style.width = dL.toFixed(2) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z4-val-liquid').innerText = dL.toFixed(2) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z4-bar-gas').style.width = dG.toFixed(1) + "%";
        document.getElementById('z4-val-gas').innerText = dG.toFixed(1) + "%";

        const topY = 50 + (dL * 2); 
        z4ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,250);
        z4ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6";
        particles.forEach(pt => {
            pt.x += pt.vx; pt.y += pt.vy;
            if(pt.x<0 || pt.x>400) pt.vx*=-1;
            if(pt.y<topY || pt.y>250) pt.vy*=-1;
            z4ctx.beginPath(); z4ctx.arc(pt.x, pt.y, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); z4ctx.fill();
        });
        z4ctx.fillStyle = "#475569"; z4ctx.fillRect(0, topY-10, 400, 10);
        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ4);
    }
    z4pS.oninput = updateZ4; updateZ4();

    // Z5 logic
    const z5dS = document.getElementById('z5-depth');
    const z5sub = document.getElementById('z5-sub');
    const z5line = document.getElementById('z5-depth-line');
    const z5c = document.getElementById('z5-molecules');
    const z5ctx = z5c.getContext('2d');

    function updateZ5() {
        const d = parseFloat(z5dS.value);
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth').innerText = d;
        document.getElementById('z5-v-depth-val').innerText = d;
        
        const p = 0.1 + (1025 * 9.81 * d / 1e6);
        const rho = 1025 * (1 + (p-0.1)/2340);
        const perc = ((rho/1025)-1)*100;
        
        document.getElementById('z5-res-p').innerText = p.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-rho').innerText = rho.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z5-res-perc').innerText = perc.toFixed(2);

        const yPerc = (d / 7000) * 80 + 10;
        z5sub.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5line.style.top = yPerc + "%";
        z5sub.innerText = d > 500 ? "🛸" : "🚢";

        // Draw molecular grid density
        z5ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,350);
        z5ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.3)";
        const step = 20 - (perc * 2);
        for(let x=0; x<400; x+=step) {
            for(let y=0; y<350; y+=step) {
                z5ctx.fillRect(x, y, 2, 2);
            }
        }
    }
    z5dS.oninput = updateZ5; updateZ5();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 6. Profil brzine u cijevi

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Voda struji kroz cijev. Profil brzine u poprečnom presjeku zadan je izrazom $v = (\frac{\beta}{4\mu}) (\frac{d^2}{4} - r^2)$, pri čemu je v - brzina vode ovisna o polumjeru r, β - konstanta, μ - viskoznost vode, d – promjer cijevi, a r - radijalna udaljenost od središnje osi cijevi. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na stjenkama cijevi uslijed strujanja vode. Odrediti tangencijalno naprezanje na polumjeru $r = \frac{d}{4}$. Ukoliko ukupna duljina cijevi iznosi L, odrediti ukupnu tangencijalnu silu na stijenkama cijevi.

**Zadano:**
* $v = (\frac{\beta}{4\mu})(\frac{d^2}{4} - r^2)$, $r = \frac{d}{4}$

**Odrediti:**
a) Tangencijalno naprezanje na stjenki $\tau_s = ?$
b) Tangencijalno naprezanje na polumjeru d/4 $\tau_{d/4} = ?$
c) Tangencijalnu silu na stijenkama cijevi $F_{\tau s} = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
Gradijent brzine: $\frac{dv}{dr} = -\frac{\beta \cdot r}{2\mu}$
Newtonov zakon: $\tau = \mu \cdot \frac{dv}{dy}$ (gdje je $y = R - r \implies dy = -dr$)
$$\tau = -\mu \frac{dv}{dr} = \frac{\beta \cdot r}{2}$$
a) Na stjenki ($r = d/2$): $\tau_s = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \cdot d}{4}}$
b) Na $r = d/4$: $\tau_{d/4} = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \cdot d}{8}}$
c) Sila: $F_{\tau s} = \tau_s \cdot A = \tau_s \cdot (d \pi L) = \mathbf{\frac{\beta \pi L d^2}{4}}$

````{=html}
<div id="z6-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z6: Newtonov zakon viskoznosti (Poiseuilleov tok)</h4>
    
    <div style="position: relative; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <canvas id="z6-main-canvas" width="800" height="320" style="width: 100%; height: 320px; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; cursor: crosshair;"></canvas>
        <div id="z6-inspect-tooltip" style="position: absolute; display: none; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.9); color: white; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; pointer-events: none; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); z-index: 10;">
            <b>Radijalni položaj:</b> <span id="z6-tt-r">0</span> mm<br>
            <b>Brzina v:</b> <span id="z6-tt-v">0</span> m/s<br>
            <b>Naprezanje τ:</b> <span id="z6-tt-tau">0</span> Pa
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Viskoznost (μ): <span id="z6-v-mu">1.0</span> mPa·s</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="10" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Gradijent tlaka (β): <span id="z6-v-beta">100</span> Pa/m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-beta" min="10" max="500" step="10" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Promjer (d): <span id="z6-v-d">100</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-d" min="40" max="150" step="5" value="100" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Duljina cijevi (L): <span id="z6-v-l">2.0</span> m</label>
            <input type="range" id="z6-l" min="0.5" max="10" step="0.5" value="2" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-top: 15px;">
        <div style="background: #fee2e2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #b91c1c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #991b1b;"><span id="z6-res-tau-wall">2.50</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #7f1d1d;">tau_s = beta d / 4</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fed7aa; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #c2410c; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Naprezanje na r = d/4</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #9a3412;"><span id="z6-res-tau-quarter">1.25</span> Pa</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #9a3412;">tau_d/4 = beta d / 8</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Ukupna sila na stijenci</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;"><span id="z6-res-force-wall">1.57</span> N</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #1e3a8a;">F_tau = tau_s pi d L</div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #ecfeff; border: 1px solid #a5f3fc; border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px;">
            <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f766e; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px;">Maksimalna brzina na osi</div>
            <div style="font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 800; color: #115e59;"><span id="z6-res-vmax">1.56</span> m/s</div>
            <div style="font-size: 0.78rem; color: #134e4a;">v_max u središtu presjeka</div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="margin-top: 15px; padding: 12px; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 8px; border-left: 4px solid #3b82f6; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #334155;">
        🎯 <b>Interakcija:</b> Klikni bilo gdje na cijev da bi istražio profil brzine i tangencijalno naprezanje. Uoči da je $\tau$ najveći na stijenci (crveno), a nula na osi (zeleno).
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z6-main-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const muS = document.getElementById('z6-mu');
    const betaS = document.getElementById('z6-beta');
    const dS = document.getElementById('z6-d');
    const lS = document.getElementById('z6-l');
    const tooltip = document.getElementById('z6-inspect-tooltip');

    let particles = Array.from({length: 70}, () => ({
        x: Math.random(),
        y: Math.random() * 2 - 1,
        size: 1.8 + Math.random() * 1.6
    }));
    let mousePos = null;
    let frame = 0;

    canvas.onmousemove = (e) => {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        mousePos = { x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top };
    };
    canvas.onmouseleave = () => { mousePos = null; tooltip.style.display = 'none'; };

    function clamp(value, min, max) {
        return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, value));
    }

    function panel(ctx, x, y, w, h, title, accent) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ffffff";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, 16, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = accent;
        ctx.font = "600 13px Inter";
        ctx.fillText(title, x + 14, y + 24);
    }

    function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r, fill, stroke) {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
        ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
        ctx.closePath();
        if (fill) ctx.fill();
        if (stroke) ctx.stroke();
    }

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width = 2) {
        const headlen = 8;
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
    }

    function draw() {
        frame += 1;
        const mu = parseFloat(muS.value) / 1000;
        const beta = parseFloat(betaS.value);
        const d_mm = parseFloat(dS.value);
        const L = parseFloat(lS.value);
        const R = d_mm / 2;
        const d_m = d_mm / 1000;
        const tauWall = beta * d_m / 4;
        const tauQuarter = beta * d_m / 8;
        const v_max = (beta * d_m * d_m) / (16 * mu);
        const F_tau = tauWall * Math.PI * d_m * L;

        document.getElementById('z6-v-mu').innerText = (mu*1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z6-v-beta').innerText = beta;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-d').innerText = d_mm;
        document.getElementById('z6-v-l').innerText = L.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-wall').innerText = tauWall.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-tau-quarter').innerText = tauQuarter.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-force-wall').innerText = F_tau.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z6-res-vmax').innerText = v_max.toFixed(2);

        const w = canvas.width;
        const h = canvas.height;
        const left = { x: 24, y: 22, w: 318, h: 276 };
        const right = { x: 366, y: 22, w: 410, h: 276 };
        const channel = {
            x: left.x + 26,
            y: left.y + 46,
            w: left.w - 52,
            h: left.h - 88
        };
        const cy = channel.y + channel.h / 2;
        const drawR = Math.min(channel.h * 0.43, 92);
        const topWall = cy - drawR;
        const bottomWall = cy + drawR;
        const chart = {
            x: right.x + 54,
            y: right.y + 34,
            w: right.w - 88,
            h: right.h - 68
        };

        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h);

        const bgGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, h);
        bgGrad.addColorStop(0, "#f8fbff");
        bgGrad.addColorStop(1, "#eef6ff");
        ctx.fillStyle = bgGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);

        panel(ctx, left.x, left.y, left.w, left.h, "Tok u cijevi", "#0f766e");
        panel(ctx, right.x, right.y, right.w, right.h, "Profil brzine v(r)", "#1d4ed8");

        // Left panel: channel
        const fluidGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(channel.x, topWall, channel.x, bottomWall);
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(0.5, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18)");
        fluidGrad.addColorStop(1, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.55)");
        ctx.fillStyle = fluidGrad;
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x, topWall, channel.w, bottomWall - topWall, 18, true, false);

        ctx.fillStyle = "#334155";
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, topWall - 12, channel.w, 10);
        ctx.fillRect(channel.x, bottomWall + 2, channel.w, 10);

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(channel.x, cy);
        ctx.lineTo(channel.x + channel.w, cy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        ctx.fillText("os cijevi", channel.x + 6, cy - 8);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, topWall - 16);
        ctx.fillText("stijenka", channel.x + 6, bottomWall + 28);

        // Layer arrows
        for (let i = 0; i <= 8; i++) {
            const y = topWall + (i / 8) * (bottomWall - topWall);
            const r_mm = ((y - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const len = clamp((v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * 120, 8, 120);
            const alpha = 0.2 + 0.55 * (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6));
            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + 18, y, channel.x + 18 + len, y, `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${alpha})`, 2.5);
        }

        // Particles
        particles.forEach((p) => {
            const r_mm = p.y * R;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const speedRatio = v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6);
            p.x += 0.003 + speedRatio * 0.018;
            if (p.x > 1.05) p.x = -0.05;
            const px = channel.x + p.x * channel.w;
            const py = cy + p.y * drawR;
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(14, 116, 144, ${0.25 + 0.6 * speedRatio})`;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        // Small formula badge
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.92)";
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#dbeafe";
        roundRect(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 150, topWall + 14, 136, 34, 10, true, true);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e40af";
        ctx.font = "600 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("v(r) = vmax (1 - (r/R)^2)", channel.x + channel.w - 140, topWall + 36);

        // Right panel: chart axes
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8";
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([4, 6]);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 4; i++) {
            const gy = chart.y + (i / 4) * chart.h;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(chart.x, gy);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, gy);
            ctx.stroke();
        }
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.font = "11px Inter";
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.fillText("+R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + 4);
        ctx.fillText("0", chart.x - 16, chart.y + chart.h / 2 + 4);
        ctx.fillText("-R", chart.x - 24, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.fillText("r", chart.x - 10, chart.y - 8);
        ctx.fillText("v", chart.x + chart.w + 8, chart.y + chart.h + 4);

        // Profile fill and curve
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y);
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h);
        ctx.closePath();
        const chartFill = ctx.createLinearGradient(chart.x, chart.y, chart.x + chart.w, chart.y);
        chartFill.addColorStop(0, "rgba(191, 219, 254, 0.15)");
        chartFill.addColorStop(1, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.32)");
        ctx.fillStyle = chartFill;
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = "#2563eb";
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        for (let i = 0; i <= 120; i++) {
            const t = i / 120;
            const r_mm = R - 2 * R * t;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - (r_mm/1000)**2));
            const px = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);
            const py = chart.y + t * chart.h;
            if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(px, py);
            else ctx.lineTo(px, py);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        // Centerline and wall stress bars
        ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.9)";
        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(chart.x, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, chart.y + chart.h / 2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        const stressBarW = clamp(16 + tauWall * 10, 16, 74);
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.18)";
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillRect(chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW, chart.y + chart.h - 12, stressBarW, 12);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#b91c1c";
        ctx.font = "600 11px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + 10);
        ctx.fillText("visoko tau", chart.x + chart.w - stressBarW - 58, chart.y + chart.h - 2);

        // Interactive highlight by radial position
        if (mousePos && mousePos.y >= topWall && mousePos.y <= bottomWall) {
            const r_inspect_mm = ((mousePos.y - cy) / drawR) * R;
            const r_m = r_inspect_mm / 1000;
            const v = Math.max(0, (beta / (4 * mu)) * ((d_mm/2000)**2 - r_m**2));
            const tau = Math.abs(beta * r_m / 2);
            const inspectYChart = chart.y + ((R - r_inspect_mm) / (2 * R)) * chart.h;
            const inspectXChart = chart.x + (v / Math.max(v_max, 1e-6)) * (chart.w - 12);

            tooltip.style.display = 'block';
            tooltip.style.left = (mousePos.x + 15) + 'px';
            tooltip.style.top = (mousePos.y + 15) + 'px';
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-r').innerText = r_inspect_mm.toFixed(1);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-v').innerText = v.toFixed(3);
            document.getElementById('z6-tt-tau').innerText = tau.toFixed(2);

            ctx.strokeStyle = "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.42)";
            ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(channel.x, mousePos.y);
            ctx.lineTo(chart.x + chart.w, mousePos.y);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            ctx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(channel.x + 14, mousePos.y, 4.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(inspectXChart, inspectYChart, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            drawArrow(ctx, channel.x + channel.w - 86, mousePos.y, channel.x + channel.w - 86 + Math.min(58, 14 + tau * 9), mousePos.y, "#ef4444", 2.5);
        } else {
            tooltip.style.display = 'none';
        }

        // Bottom legends
        ctx.fillStyle = "#64748b";
        ctx.font = "12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("sporije uz stijenku", channel.x, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("najbrže na osi", channel.x + channel.w - 92, left.y + left.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText("parabolični profil", chart.x, right.y + right.h - 14);
        ctx.fillText("tau raste prema stijenci", chart.x + chart.w - 138, right.y + right.h - 14);

        requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }

    draw();
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 7. Blok koji klizi niz kosinu

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Blok kvadratnog presjeka težine 1,1 [kN], duljine bridova 250 [mm] klizi kosinom koja sa horizontalnom osi zatvara kut od 20° po sloju ulja debljine 6 μm. Ukoliko pretpostavimo linearan profil brzine i konstantnu debljinu sloja ulja, potrebno je odrediti ustaljenu brzinu bloka. Dinamička viskoznost ulja iznosi 7 [mPa s].

**Zadano:**
* $F_G = 1100 \, [N], a = 0,25 \, [m], \alpha = 20°, \delta_u = 6 \cdot 10^{-6} \, [m], \mu = 0,007 \, [Pa s]$

**Odrediti:** $v_B = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
Sila koja uzrokuje gibanje: $F_x = F_G \cdot \sin\alpha = 1100 \cdot \sin 20° = 376,2 \, [N]$
Otpor uslijed viskoznosti: $F_\tau = \tau \cdot A = \mu \cdot \frac{v}{\delta_u} \cdot a^2$
Izjednačavanjem: $F_x = F_\tau \implies v_B = \frac{F_G \cdot \sin\alpha \cdot \delta_u}{\mu \cdot a^2} = \mathbf{5,16 \, [m/s]}$

***

### 8. Sila na rotirajuće vratilo

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Vratilo promjera 70[mm] i duljine 250 [mm] giba se brzinom od 400 [mm/s] duž rukavca ležaja promjera 70,2 [mm]. Pretpostavljena je jednolika zračnost ispunjena uljem temperature 20°C, pri čemu kinematička viskoznost iznosi 0,005 [m2/s], dok je relativna gustoća ulja 0,9. Potrebno je odrediti silu kojom ulje djeluje na vratilo.

**Zadano:**
* $D_v = 0,07 \, [m], v = 0,4 \, [m/s], D_L = 0,0702 \, [m], L_L = 0,25 \, [m], \nu = 0,005 \, [m^2/s], \bar{\rho}_u = 0,9$

**Odrediti silu kojom ulje djeluje na vratilo:** $F_\tau = ?$

**RJEŠENJE:**
Dodirna površina: $A = D_v \cdot \pi \cdot L_L = 0,054978 \, [m^2]$
Gustoća ulja ($\rho_{v20} = 998$): $\rho = 0,9 \cdot 998 = 898,2 \, [kg/m^3]$
Dinamička viskoznost: $\mu = \nu \cdot \rho = 0,005 \cdot 898,2 = 4,491 \, [kg/ms]$
Zračnost: $y = \frac{D_L - D_v}{2} = 0,0001 \, [m]$
Sila: $F_\tau = \mu \frac{v}{y} A = 4,491 \cdot \frac{0,4}{0,0001} \cdot 0,054978 = \mathbf{987,6 \, [N]}$

````{=html}
<div id="z7-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z7: Blok na kosini s uljnim filmom</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.5; min-width: 320px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 300px; overflow: hidden;">
            <canvas id="z7-canvas" width="500" height="300" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <b>Zoom na sloj ulja (δ):</b><br>
                <canvas id="z7-zoom-canvas" width="100" height="60" style="width: 100px; height: 60px; background: #f0f9ff; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600;">Kut α: <span id="z7-v-alpha">20</span>°</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-alpha" min="5" max="45" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block;">Viskoznost μ: <span id="z7-v-mu">7</span> mPa·s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-mu" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="7" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block;">Sloj ulja δ: <span id="z7-v-delta">6</span> μm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z7-delta" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="6" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #bbf7d0;">
                <div style="font-weight: 700; color: #166534;">Ustaljena brzina v_B:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: #166534;"><span id="z7-res-v">5.16</span> m/s</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div id="z8-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 30px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z8: Vratilo u ležaju (Viskozno trenje)</h4>
    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
        <div style="flex: 1.2; min-width: 300px; position: relative; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 250px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;">
            <canvas id="z8-canvas" width="400" height="250" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; font-size: 0.85rem;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600;">Brzina v: <span id="z8-v-v">0.4</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z8-v" min="0.1" max="2.0" step="0.1" value="0.4" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; margin-top: 10px; display: block;">Zračnost y: <span id="z8-v-y">0.1</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="z8-y" min="0.05" max="0.5" step="0.05" value="0.1" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #bae6fd;">
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px;">
                    <div style="color: #0369a1;">Sila otpora Fτ:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z8-res-f">987.6</span> N</div>
                    <div style="color: #0369a1;">Snaga trenja P:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #0369a1;"><span id="z8-res-p">395.0</span> W</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    // Z7 Logic
    const z7c = document.getElementById('z7-canvas'); const z7ctx = z7c.getContext('2d');
    const z7zc = document.getElementById('z7-zoom-canvas'); const z7zctx = z7zc.getContext('2d');
    const z7aS = document.getElementById('z7-alpha'); const z7mS = document.getElementById('z7-mu'); const z7dS = document.getElementById('z7-delta');

    let z7Pos = 0;
    function updateZ7() {
        const alpha = parseFloat(z7aS.value) * Math.PI / 180;
        const mu = parseFloat(z7mS.value) / 1000;
        const delta = parseFloat(z7dS.value) / 1e6;
        const G = 1100; const side = 0.25;
        
        const v = (G * Math.sin(alpha) * delta) / (mu * side * side);
        
        document.getElementById('z7-v-alpha').innerText = z7aS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-mu').innerText = z7mS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-v-delta').innerText = z7dS.value;
        document.getElementById('z7-res-v').innerText = v.toFixed(2);

        z7Pos += v * 0.5; if(z7Pos > 600) z7Pos = -100;

        z7ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,300);
        // Kosina
        z7ctx.save();
        z7ctx.translate(0, 50);
        z7ctx.rotate(alpha);
        
        // Ulje
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.3)";
        z7ctx.fillRect(-100, 0, 700, 5);
        
        // Blok
        z7ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        z7ctx.fillRect(z7Pos, -40, 60, 40);
        
        // Vektori
        const cx = z7Pos + 30, cy = -20;
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx, cy + 50/Math.cos(alpha), "#166534", "G"); // Weight (corrected for tilt)
        drawArrow(z7ctx, cx, cy, cx - 40, cy, "#ef4444", "Fτ"); // Friction
        
        z7ctx.restore();

        // Zoom layer
        z7zctx.clearRect(0,0,100,60);
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "rgba(49, 130, 206, 0.4)";
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 10, 100, 40);
        z7zctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; z7zctx.lineWidth = 2;
        z7zctx.beginPath(); z7zctx.moveTo(10, 50); z7zctx.lineTo(10 + Math.min(v*5, 80), 10); z7zctx.stroke();
        z7zctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; z7zctx.fillRect(0, 0, 100, 10); // Block bottom
        z7zctx.fillRect(0, 50, 100, 10); // Surface

        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ7);
    }
    [z7aS, z7mS, z7dS].forEach(s => s.oninput = updateZ7); updateZ7();

    // Z8 Logic
    const z8c = document.getElementById('z8-canvas'); const z8ctx = z8c.getContext('2d');
    const z8vS = document.getElementById('z8-v'); const z8yS = document.getElementById('z8-y');

    function updateZ8() {
        const v = parseFloat(z8vS.value);
        const y_mm = parseFloat(z8yS.value);
        const mu = 4.491; // from problem
        const A = 0.054978;
        
        const F = mu * (v / (y_mm/1000)) * A;
        const P = F * v;
        
        document.getElementById('z8-v-v').innerText = v.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z8-v-y').innerText = y_mm.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z8-res-f').innerText = F.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z8-res-p').innerText = P.toFixed(1);

        z8ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,250);
        const cx = 200, cy = 125, rV = 60, rL = 60 + y_mm * 100;
        
        // Bearing
        z8ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; z8ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rL+5, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.stroke();
        
        // Oil film color gradient
        const grd = z8ctx.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, rV, cx, cy, rL);
        grd.addColorStop(0, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)");
        grd.addColorStop(1, "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)");
        z8ctx.fillStyle = grd;
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rL, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.fill();
        
        // Shaft
        z8ctx.fillStyle = "#475569";
        z8ctx.beginPath(); z8ctx.arc(cx, cy, rV, 0, Math.PI*2); z8ctx.fill();
        z8ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; z8ctx.lineWidth = 2; z8ctx.stroke();
        
        // Rotation indicator
        z8ctx.save();
        z8ctx.translate(cx, cy);
        z8ctx.rotate(Date.now() * 0.002 * v);
        z8ctx.fillStyle = "white"; z8ctx.fillRect(rV-10, -2, 10, 4);
        z8ctx.restore();
        
        requestAnimationFrame(updateZ8);
    }
    [z8vS, z8yS].forEach(s => s.oninput = updateZ8); updateZ8();

    function drawArrow(ctx, x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const headlen = 10; const angle = Math.atan2(y2-y1, x2-x1);
        ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x1, y1); ctx.lineTo(x2, y2); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle-Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle-Math.PI/6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2-headlen*Math.cos(angle+Math.PI/6), y2-headlen*Math.sin(angle+Math.PI/6));
        ctx.fill();
        if(label) { ctx.font="bold 10px Inter"; ctx.fillText(label, x2+5, y2+5); }
    }
})();
</script>
````

<br>

***

### 9. Utjecaj temperature na silu pomicanja klipa

**Tekst zadatka:** 
Klip promjera 70 [mm] giba se unutar cilindra promjera 70,1 [mm]. Potrebno je odrediti postotak smanjenja sile potrebne za pomicanje klipa kada se ulje zagrije sa temperature 0 [°C] na temperaturu 120 [°C]. Dinamička viskoznost ulja pri 0 [°C] iznosi 0,01820[Pa s], odnosno 0,00206[Pa s] pri temperaturi 120[°C].

**Zadano:**
* $D_k = 0,07[m], D_c = 0,0701[m], t_p = 0[°C], t_k = 120[°C]$
* $\mu_0 = 0,0182[Pa s], \mu_{120} = 0,00206[Pa s]$

**Odrediti postotak smanjenja sile:** $\frac{\Delta F_\tau}{F_{\tau 0}}$

**RJEŠENJE:**
Iz jednadžbe za tangencijalno naprezanje: $F_\tau = \mu \cdot \frac{v}{y} \cdot A$. Budući da su brzina i geometrija konstantni, omjer sila odgovara omjeru viskoznosti:
$$\frac{F_{\tau 120}}{F_{\tau 0}} = \frac{\mu_{120}}{\mu_0} = \frac{0,00206}{0,0182} = 0,113187$$
Smanjenje sile:
$$\frac{\Delta F_{\tau 120-0}}{F_{\tau 0}} = (1 - 0,113187) = \mathbf{0,8868}$$
Tangencijalna sila smanjuje se zagrijavanjem ulja za 88,7%.

````{=html}
<div id="z9-advanced-widget" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 20px auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 16px; padding: 25px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #f8fafc 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1e293b; margin-top: 0; font-weight: 700;">Z9: Viskoznost vs Temperatura (Termička utrka)</h4>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 1fr; gap: 30px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
        <!-- Visuals -->
        <div style="background: white; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; height: 350px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
````
