````{=html}
            <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative;">
                <!-- Piston and Oil -->
                <div id="z9-oil-box" style="width: 200px; height: 100px; border: 2px solid #475569; position: relative; background: #5c4033;">
                    <div id="z9-piston" style="position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 10px; width: 40px; height: 80px; background: #94a3b8; border: 2px solid #475569; transition: left 0.1s linear;"></div>
                    <canvas id="z9-molecules-canvas" width="200" height="100" style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none;"></canvas>
                </div>
                <!-- Force Arrow -->
                <div id="z9-force-arrow" style="position: absolute; left: 40px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); white-space: nowrap;">
                    <div style="height: 4px; background: #ef4444; width: 50px; position: relative; transition: width 0.3s;">
                        <div style="position: absolute; right: -10px; top: -8px; width: 0; height: 0; border-top: 10px solid transparent; border-bottom: 10px solid transparent; border-left: 12px solid #ef4444;"></div>
                    </div>
                    <span style="font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444; position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 0;">Sila F</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div style="height: 120px; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 10px;">
                <canvas id="z9-graph-canvas" width="400" height="100" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Controls -->
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="background: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Temperatura: <span id="z9-v-t">0</span> °C</label>
                <input type="range" id="z9-t-slider" min="0" max="120" step="1" value="0" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #ef4444;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.65rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 5px;">
                    <span>Hladno (Gusto)</span><span>Vruće (Rijetko)</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #fdf2f8; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #fbcfe8;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #9d174d; margin-bottom: 8px;">ANALIZA VISKOZNOSTI:</div>
                <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #9d174d;">
                    <div>Din. viskoznost μ:</div><div style="font-weight: 800;"><span id="z9-res-mu">0.0182</span> Pa·s</div>
                    <div>Relativna sila F/F₀:</div><div style="font-weight: 800;"><span id="z9-res-f-rel">100</span> %</div>
                    <div>Smanjenje sile:</div><div style="font-weight: 800; color: #ef4444;"><span id="z9-res-red">0.0</span> %</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <p style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic;">
                💡 <b>Fizikalni uvid:</b> Viskoznost ulja eksponencijalno opada s temperaturom. Zagrijavanjem "razbijamo" molekularne lance, čime drastično smanjujemo otpor gibanju.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const tS = document.getElementById('z9-t-slider');
    const piston = document.getElementById('z9-piston');
    const oilBox = document.getElementById('z9-oil-box');
    const forceArrow = document.getElementById('z9-force-arrow').firstElementChild;
    const molCanvas = document.getElementById('z9-molecules-canvas');
    const molCtx = molCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const graphCanvas = document.getElementById('z9-graph-canvas');
    const graphCtx = graphCanvas.getContext('2d');

    let pistonX = 10;
    let direction = 1;

    function update() {
        const T = parseFloat(tS.value);
        document.getElementById('z9-v-t').innerText = T;
        
        // Exponential interpolation for viscosity
        // mu = mu0 * exp(-k * T)
        const mu0 = 0.0182;
        const mu120 = 0.00206;
        const k = Math.log(mu0 / mu120) / 120;
        const mu = mu0 * Math.exp(-k * T);
        
        const fRel = (mu / mu0) * 100;
        const reduction = 100 - fRel;
        
        document.getElementById('z9-res-mu').innerText = mu.toFixed(4);
        document.getElementById('z9-res-f-rel').innerText = fRel.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z9-res-red').innerText = reduction.toFixed(1);

        // Visuals
        const tRatio = T / 120;
        // Color: Dark brown (#5c4033) to Golden (#fcd34d)
        const r = Math.floor(92 + tRatio * (252 - 92));
        const g = Math.floor(64 + tRatio * (211 - 64));
        const b = Math.floor(51 + tRatio * (77 - 51));
        oilBox.style.background = `rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`;
        
        forceArrow.style.width = (20 + (mu / mu0) * 80) + "px";

        drawMolecules(tRatio);
        drawGraph(T, k, mu0);
    }

    function drawMolecules(tRatio) {
        molCtx.clearRect(0,0,200,100);
        molCtx.strokeStyle = "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)";
        molCtx.lineWidth = 1;
        
        const count = 20;
        const jitter = tRatio * 15;
        for(let i=0; i<count; i++) {
            let x = (i * 10) % 200;
            let y = (Math.floor(i/2) * 20) % 100;
            molCtx.beginPath();
            molCtx.moveTo(x + Math.random()*jitter, y + Math.random()*jitter);
            if(tRatio < 0.5) {
                // Draw chains
                molCtx.lineTo(x + 15 + Math.random()*jitter, y + 5 + Math.random()*jitter);
            } else {
                // Draw dots
                molCtx.arc(x, y, 2, 0, Math.PI*2);
            }
            molCtx.stroke();
        }
    }

    function drawGraph(currT, k, mu0) {
        graphCtx.clearRect(0,0,400,100);
        graphCtx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; graphCtx.lineWidth = 1;
        // Axes
        graphCtx.beginPath(); graphCtx.moveTo(30, 10); graphCtx.lineTo(30, 90); graphCtx.lineTo(380, 90); graphCtx.stroke();
        
        // Curve
        graphCtx.strokeStyle = "#ec4899"; graphCtx.lineWidth = 2;
        graphCtx.beginPath();
        for(let t=0; t<=120; t++) {
            const m = mu0 * Math.exp(-k * t);
            const gx = 30 + (t / 120) * 340;
            const gy = 90 - (m / mu0) * 70;
            if(t===0) graphCtx.moveTo(gx, gy); else graphCtx.lineTo(gx, gy);
        }
        graphCtx.stroke();

        // Current point
        const px = 30 + (currT / 120) * 340;
        const py = 90 - (mu0 * Math.exp(-k * currT) / mu0) * 70;
        graphCtx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        graphCtx.beginPath(); graphCtx.arc(px, py, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); graphCtx.fill();
        
        graphCtx.fillStyle = "#64748b"; graphCtx.font = "8px Inter";
        graphCtx.fillText("μ (Viskoznost)", 35, 20);
        graphCtx.fillText("T (°C)", 360, 85);
    }

    function animatePiston() {
        const mu = parseFloat(document.getElementById('z9-res-mu').innerText);
        const mu0 = 0.0182;
        const speed = (mu0 / mu) * 2; // Move faster if less viscous? No, user says "speed is same, force arrow decreases"
        // Wait, Claude says "animation speed is same, but force arrow decreases".
        
        pistonX += direction * 2;
        if(pistonX > 140 || pistonX < 10) direction *= -1;
        piston.style.left = pistonX + "px";
        requestAnimationFrame(animatePiston);
    }

    tS.oninput = update;
    update();
    animatePiston();
})();
</script>
````
